user.title: Initial setup
user.description: Choose the weather source, set indoor comfort values, and optionally pick one or more notification devices.

data_description.outdoor_weather_entity_id: Choose the standard Home Assistant weather entity VentWise can use today. If you do not see the source you need, open a GitHub issue.
data_description.target_temperature_c: Set the indoor temperature that feels comfortable when you are home.
data_description.target_humidity_percent: Set the indoor humidity that feels comfortable when you are home.
data_description.stability_minutes: How long the recommendation should stay the same before VentWise acts. If you are not sure, leave the default value.
data_description.notification_device_id: Optional. Pick one or more devices that should receive VentWise notifications.

outdoor.title: Outdoor data
outdoor.description: Use the checkboxes to decide which outdoor measurements come from Home Assistant entities instead of the weather forecast.

data_description.outdoor_temperature_override: Turn this on to enter a numeric temperature entity instead of using the weather forecast.
data_description.outdoor_humidity_override: Turn this on to enter a numeric humidity entity instead of using the weather forecast.
data_description.wind_speed_override: Turn this on to enter a numeric wind speed entity instead of using the weather forecast.

outdoor_overrides.title: Manual outdoor values
outdoor_overrides.description: Fill in only the fields you turned on with the checkboxes.

data_description.outdoor_temperature_entity_id: Required only when manual temperature is enabled.
data_description.outdoor_humidity_entity_id: Required only when manual humidity is enabled.
data_description.wind_speed_entity_id: Required only when manual wind speed is enabled.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.description: Add, edit, or remove rooms and macro-rooms for spaces whose windows affect the same air.

menu_option_descriptions.add_room: Create one room for a single space or area.
menu_option_descriptions.add_macro_room: Create one grouped area for spaces that share the same windows.
menu_option_descriptions.edit_room: Update an existing room or grouped area.
menu_option_descriptions.remove_room: Delete an existing room or grouped area.
menu_option_descriptions.finish: Skip rooms for now and save the setup.

edit_room_select.title: Edit room
edit_room_select.description: Choose the room you want to update.

data_description.room_selection: Select one of the rooms already saved in VentWise.

remove_room_select.title: Remove room
remove_room_select.description: Choose the room you want to delete.

data_description.room_selection: Select one of the rooms already saved in VentWise.

add_room.title: Add room
add_room.description: Create one room for a space with its own windows. You can optionally override the comfort temperature for this room.

data_description.enabled: Turn this off if you do not want VentWise to consider this room.
data_description.name: A friendly name for this room, like Bedroom or Study.
data_description.target_temperature_c_override: Optional. Use this room-specific comfort temperature instead of the global one.
data_description.humidity_entity_id: Optional. Pick the room humidity sensor.
data_description.start_entity_id: Optional. Select the automation VentWise should run when it asks to open windows in this room.
data_description.stop_entity_id: Optional. Select the automation VentWise should run when it asks to close windows in this room.

edit_room_form.title: Edit room
edit_room_form.description: Update the selected room for a space with its own windows. You can also change the room-specific comfort temperature override.

data_description.enabled: Turn this off if you do not want VentWise to consider this room.
data_description.name: A friendly name for this room, like Bedroom or Study.
data_description.target_temperature_c_override: Optional. Use this room-specific comfort temperature instead of the global one.
data_description.humidity_entity_id: Optional. Pick the room humidity sensor.
data_description.start_entity_id: Optional. Select the automation VentWise should run when it asks to open windows in this room.
data_description.stop_entity_id: Optional. Select the automation VentWise should run when it asks to close windows in this room.

add_macro_room.title: Add macro-room
add_macro_room.description: Create one grouped area for spaces that share the same windows. You can optionally override the comfort temperature for this area.

data_description.enabled: Turn this off if you do not want VentWise to consider this area.
data_description.name: A friendly name for this grouped area, like Upstairs or Living area.
data_description.temperature_entity_id: Pick the main temperature sensor for this area.
data_description.target_temperature_c_override: Optional. Use this area-specific comfort temperature instead of the global one.
data_description.humidity_entity_id: Optional. Pick the humidity sensor for this area.
data_description.start_entity_id: Optional. Select the automation VentWise should run when it asks to open windows in this area.
data_description.stop_entity_id: Optional. Select the automation VentWise should run when it asks to close windows in this area.

edit_macro_room_form.title: Edit macro-room
edit_macro_room_form.description: Update the selected grouped area that shares the same windows. You can also change the area-specific comfort temperature override.

data_description.enabled: Turn this off if you do not want VentWise to consider this area.
data_description.name: A friendly name for this grouped area, like Upstairs or Living area.
data_description.temperature_entity_id: Pick the main temperature sensor for this area.
data_description.target_temperature_c_override: Optional. Use this area-specific comfort temperature instead of the global one.
data_description.humidity_entity_id: Optional. Pick the humidity sensor for this area.
data_description.start_entity_id: Optional. Select the automation VentWise should run when it asks to open windows in this area.
data_description.stop_entity_id: Optional. Select the automation VentWise should run when it asks to close windows in this area.

error.invalid_input: One or more values are invalid.

init.title: Adjust VentWise
init.description: Choose what you want to edit.

menu_option_descriptions.outdoor: Choose forecast or manual values for each outdoor measurement with checkboxes.

outdoor.title: Outdoor data
outdoor.description: Use the checkboxes to decide which outdoor measurements come from Home Assistant entities instead of the weather forecast.

data_description.outdoor_temperature_override: Turn this on to enter a numeric temperature entity instead of using the weather forecast.
data_description.outdoor_humidity_override: Turn this on to enter a numeric humidity entity instead of using the weather forecast.
data_description.wind_speed_override: Turn this on to enter a numeric wind speed entity instead of using the weather forecast.

data_description.outdoor_weather_entity_id: Choose the standard Home Assistant weather entity VentWise can use today. If you do not see the source you need, open a GitHub issue.
data_description.notification_device_id: Optional. Pick one or more devices that should receive notifications.

advanced.title: Comfort settings
advanced.description: Fine-tune the comfort values used by VentWise.

data_description.soft_outdoor_threshold_c: Above this temperature outside, opening windows becomes less useful.
data_description.cooldown_minutes: How long VentWise waits before sending the same notification again.

data_description.target_humidity_percent_override: Optional. Use this area-specific comfort humidity percentage instead of the global one.
data_description.start_entity_id: Optional. Select the automation VentWise should run when it asks to open windows in this area.
data_description.stop_entity_id: Optional. Select the automation VentWise should run when it asks to close windows in this area.
